product_varient.name: 4700BC Hawaiian Barbeque Corn Popped Chips + - Pack of 2
4700BC Hawaiian Barbeque Corn Popped Chips + - Pack of 3

attributes.Description: With 60% less fat and 40% fewer calories than regular chips, this is healthy snacking with a tropical twist. Made from 100% non-GMO corn and air-popped (never fried or baked), these light, crunchy chips are coated in a smoky Hawaiian barbeque seasoning for a bold, island-inspired bite. Gluten-free, vegan, and packed with flavor—snacking smart has never tasted this good.
attributes.Key Features:
Made using Popped Technology, not fried, not baked, for a unique airy crunch and light texture

Crafted with 100% corn and 60% less fat than average chips for a smarter, guilt-free snack

Only 121 kcal per serving with no palm oil, no trans fat, and no gluten

Naturally gluten-free, made with non-GMO corn, whole grain, and just 3 clean ingredients: corn, a little oil, and seasoning
attributes.Ingredients: Corn (78%), Edible Vegetable Oil (Rice Bran Oil), Seasoning [Maltodextrin, Sugar, Dehydrated Vegetables (Onion, Garlic, Tomato), Iodized Salt, Thickeners (INS 1422), Dextrose, Hydrolyzed Protein (Corn), Mixed Spices, Edible Vegetable Oil (Sunflower Oil), Anticaking Agent (INS 551), Flavour Enhancer (INS 627 & 631), Acidity Regulator (INS 330), Emulsifier (INS 322), Rosemary Extract (INS 392).
attributes.Nutrition Information: Per 28g serving: Energy 127 Kcal, Protein 2.2g, Carbohydrates 21g, Total Sugars 0g, Added Sugars 0g, Dietary Fibre 0.9g, Total Fat 3.9g, Saturated Fat 1.7g, Trans Fat 0g, Cholesterol 0mg, Sodium 125mg.
